ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Continued To Aug-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harry Maring, via ZOOM, for Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., Personal Representative.

The court begins by asking counsel for the status of an Inventory and Appraisal and a Petition. Counsel reports that he had submitted a Petition for Final Distribution but that it had been rejected because the address on the petition did not match the address in the court's register. Counsel confirms that he has resubmitted a Petition for Final Distribution and a Change of Address for e-filing and is in the queue. Counsel also reports that he has filed a partial Inventory and Appraisal and will file a Final Inventory and Appraisal soon.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 11, 2011, at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status of Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Balmy. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Continued To Jul-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harry Manning, via ZOOM, counsel for Wells Fargo Bank, Personal Representative.

The court requests status of this matter and that either a petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status on Report and a Final Inventory and Appraisal should be filed. Counsel reports that the petition has been forwarded to Wells Fargo for review and that he will file an Inventory and Appraisal and petition within a week.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to July 14, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-21-2021 Continued To May-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harry Maring for Wells Fargo Bank (Petitioner).

Mr. Maring stated that he had correspondence by e-mail with Attorney Ryan Cunningham in which Mr. Cunningham informed him that he is not going to file an objection (copy of e-mail provided). Mr. Maring also provided a proposed order. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for April 21, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2019 Continued To Oct-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harry Maring for Wells Fargo Bank (Petitioner).
Ryan Cunningham for David Cowan (Heir).

The was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Cunningham stated that he is gathering information right now, and that he is hoping not to file objections, but he needs more information to make that determination. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to October 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
